case_title: THOMAS WING HING LAI ET AL VS. BRADLEY ALEXANDER WELLS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, THOMAS WING HING BUSSA, NAVAPORN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS, BRADLEY ALEXANDER $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NAVAPORN BUSSA $4952 AND SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF THOMAS HING LAI $5048. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAI, THOMAS WING HING BUSSA, NAVAPORN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, BRADLEY ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, THOMAS WING HING BUSSA, NAVAPORN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, BRADLEY ALEXANDER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-08-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, BRADLEY ALEXANDER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF THOMAS WING HING IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF NARAPORN BUSSA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRADLEY ALEXANDER WELLS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
